title: Remote control
description: Let a phone/web client remotely take over this machine's session (tools still run locally). Once enabled, local conversations are mirrored to the phone, and the phone can drive the same session.
pairingCodeLabel: Pairing code (paste into the web client)
pairingCodeHint: Paste this into the web/phone client within 5 minutes. It is single-use and contains only a short-lived credential-claim nonce, never an account key or device private key.
copyFailed: Copy failed — copy the code manually.
note: Remote control requires the desktop (GUI + agent) to be online and awake. Desktop and web use separate NKey private keys with short-lived JWTs; NATS enforces pairId-scoped subject isolation.

error.network: Cannot reach the Future server. Check your network connection and try again.
error.revoked: This pairing was revoked or is no longer valid. Pair again to continue.
error.server: The Future server returned an error. Please try again later.
error.loop_dead: The command subscription stopped. Restart remote control to recover.
error.web_bind: The local web client could not start (its port may already be in use). The bridge is still running.
error.generic: The remote control action failed. Please try again.
